short_summary: Iran deal near; Tren de Aragua update
rationale: For US residents, the approaching Iran deal and continued Tren de Aragua operations are the most policy-relevant developments; Anthropic AI suspension continues as background.

top_events.title: Iran claims deal with US near; Israel strikes Lebanon
top_events.summary: A US-Iran deal nearing conclusion could reduce Middle East tensions and oil market risk for American consumers, though Lebanon strikes complicate the picture.

top_events.title: US kills leader of Venezuela's Tren de Aragua gang in airstrike
top_events.summary: Trump confirms a US airstrike killed the Tren de Aragua leader, continuing aggressive posture against foreign criminal organizations — a domestic security policy milestone.

top_events.title: Anthropic suspends new AI tools over US government security concerns
top_events.summary: Anthropic's continued suspension of AI tools for foreign nationals reflects ongoing federal AI security policy, with implications for US tech sector and AI development pace.
